zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Abbott於1592年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特米亞雷時，她的父親Thomas Abbott38歲，母親Anne Dolan34歲。她和John Warren III至少有5個兒子和9個女兒。她於1587年住在英國爾且於1587年住在英國英格蘭爾。她去世於1662年11月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年70歲，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Abbott于1592年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特米亞雷时，她的父亲Thomas Abbott38岁，母亲Anne Dolan34岁。她和John Warren III至少有5个儿子和9个女儿。她于1587年住在英国爾且于1587年住在英国英格兰爾。她去世于1662年11月6日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年70岁，埋葬在巴基斯坦آزاد جموں و کشمیر布利a爾。

nameMeanings.name: Abbott
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English abbod, abbot(t), abbat ‘abbot’ (Old English abbod) or Old French abet ‘priest’. Both the Old English and the Old French term are derived from Late Latin abbas (genitive abbatis) ‘priest’, from Greek abbas, from Aramaic aba ‘father’. The nickname was presumably a joking reference to a person's behaviour. In the US, the English name is also sometimes a translation of a cognate or equivalent European name, e.g. Italian Abate , Spanish Abad , or German Abt .

History: George Abbot from Yorkshire, England, settled in Andover, MA, in 1640; he had numerous prominent descendants. George Abbott (probably not the same man) died in Rowley, MA, in 1647. Another early migrant was James Abbott, who came from Somerset, England, to Long Island, NY, in the 17th century.

variants.name: Abate
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Antonio, Carmelo, Carmine, Gaetano, Vito, Angelo, Canio, Rocco, Sal, Aldo, Carlo.

Italian: from abate ‘priest’ (from Late Latin abbas ‘priest’, genitive abbatis). It could be a nickname, perhaps given to someone who behaved in a priest-like manner, an occupational name for the servant of a priest, or it may denote an (illegitimate) son of a priest. Compare Labate .

variants.name: Abbot
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of Abbott . The spelling with one -t is more typically Scottish than English, and in Gaelic-speaking areas of Scotland, this is sometimes an Anglicized form of McNabb .

variants.name: Abbotts
meanings: topographic or occupational name from Middle English (atte) abbotes ‘(at the, of the) abbot's (house or quarters)’, a name for someone who lived or worked at such a place, presumably a servant.
variant of Abbott , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Abbott was born in 1592, in Meare, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, Thomas Abbott, was 38 and her mother, Anne Dolan, was 34. She had at least 5 sons and 9 daughters with John Warren III. She lived in Cheshire, England in 1587 and Cheshire, England, United Kingdom in 1587. She died on 6 November 1662, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 70, and was buried in Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Abbott est née en 1592, à Meare, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Abbott, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Anne Dolan, avait 34 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 9 filles avec John Warren III. Elle a vécu à Cheshire, Angleterre en 1587 et à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni en 1587. Elle est décédée le 6 novembre 1662, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Abbott è nata il nel 1592 nel Meare, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Thomas Abbott, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Anne Dolan, aveva 34 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 9 figlie con John Warren III. Vissuto a Cheshire, England nel 1587 e nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito nel 1587. Morì il 6 novembre 1662, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistan.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Abbott(이)가 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 미이르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Abbott(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Dolan(은)는 34세였다. 그녀는 John Warren III(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 1587년도에 영국 체실르에서, 1587년도에 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 살았다. 그녀는 1662년 11월 6일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 파키스탄 آزاد جموں و کشمیر 버이a에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Abbott nasceu em 1592, em Meare, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Abbott, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Anne Dolan, tinha 34 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 9 filhas com John Warren III. Ela viveu em Cheshire, Inglaterra em 1587 e em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom em 1587. Ela faleceu em 6 de novembro de 1662, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Paquistão.

ru.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Abbott родилась в 1592 г. в местности мир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Thomas Abbott было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Dolan, 34. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 9 дочерей от John Warren III. Она жила в местности чешир, Англия в 1587 году и в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания в 1587 году. Она умерла 6 ноября 1662 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности буриaл, آزاد جموں و کشمیر, Пакистан.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Abbott nació en 1592, en Meare, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Thomas Abbott, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Anne Dolan, tenía 34 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 9 hijas con John Warren III. Vivió en Cheshire, Inglaterra en 1587 y en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido en 1587. Murió el 6 de noviembre de 1662, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Buriāl, Azad Kashmir, Pakistán.
